scope: Issue #173 CLI-surface inventory from the public Freshdesk API reference and parent #172 baseline (170 operations: 117 GET, 10 POST, 10 PUT, 33 DELETE). Existing streams remain covered; all other documented operations are blocked-by-default metadata for follow-up stream, direct-read, binary, and reverse-ETL lanes. No raw generic HTTP write surface is exposed.
